title: cyclosorus obstructus
intro: Cyclosorus obstructus, also known as the interrupted lady fern, is a type of flowering plant in the fern family (Dryopteridaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus obstructus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are typically dried and made into tea or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
